user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — REVERT the gem-surfacing change (#452). It promoted relationship_risk_silence candidates to a winnable tier, but the top such candidate (roman) is a Handshake/Slack BROADCAST sender — the 95% automated noise the Bible (Part II-C) says Foldera must suppress, not surface. The original gate correctly blocked it. Reverts lib/briefing/artifact-taste-pack.ts to the pre-#452 logic, deletes the wrong-premised test, and rewrites docs/GEM_SURFACING.md with the doctrine-grounded gem definition (high-consequence buried signal + right time + right channel + one act). The real forward lever is HARDENING transactional/broadcast suppression, not loosening the gate. Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: Revert: the one taste-pack file back to pre-#452 + delete the wrong test + corrected doctrine doc + control-plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/api, schema, or deps. Only the named brain file revert.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run lib/briefing/__tests__/ && npm run typecheck
required_browser_proof: N/A — revert of a backend tiering change to its proven prior state.
acceptance_condition: artifact-taste-pack.ts is back to the pre-#452 gate (relationship_risk_silence not promoted), the wrong-premised gem-tiering test is removed, docs/GEM_SURFACING.md states the doctrine-correct gem definition, briefing suite + typecheck green, gate:continuity passes, #445 updated.
anti_regression_checks: briefing suite green + typecheck clean; only artifact-taste-pack.ts reverted under lib/
no code path promotes relationship_risk_silence (roman-class noise stays suppressed)
stop_condition: Stop when the revert is up as a PR with proof; next lever (transactional-sender hardening) named.
next_command: Forward lever: harden TRANSACTIONAL_SENDER_RE / broadcast detection so Handshake/Slack/notification senders never become relationship candidates (pure noise reduction). Then verify the high-consequence domains (money/legal_gov/medical/work_transition) are what rises. Accept correct silence if the data is genuinely all noise + low-stakes.
